ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added
Mango, flesh without skin, pitted, raw

ingredients_text: Atlantic salmon (Salmo salar) 50%, sauce (50%) (water, sugar, tomato paste, apple cider vinegar, pepper flakes, spices, salt, mango, thickener: xanthan gum, chili flakes (0.5%))
